## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential RevOps collaboration between Kyle Doherty and GrowthX.ai](https://fathom.video/share/yJWrVpSJ4ykuN8kQXVsG1sWCHWy_YciK?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX.ai aims to build tools for non-developer knowledge workers, starting with GTM](https://fathom.video/share/yJWrVpSJ4ykuN8kQXVsG1sWCHWy_YciK?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [Current focus: mining inbound signals, nurturing warm leads, and scaling high-touch relationship building](https://fathom.video/share/yJWrVpSJ4ykuN8kQXVsG1sWCHWy_YciK?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
  - [Kyle's background spans digital marketing, development, and RevOps; now freelancing with focus on go-to-market engineering](https://fathom.video/share/yJWrVpSJ4ykuN8kQXVsG1sWCHWy_YciK?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)
  - [Potential collaboration: 30-40 hours/month, starting with a block of hours to test fit](https://fathom.video/share/yJWrVpSJ4ykuN8kQXVsG1sWCHWy_YciK?tab=summary&timestamp=1843.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX.ai's Business Model and Vision

  - [Half the team building tools, half running agency to inform tool development](https://fathom.video/share/yJWrVpSJ4ykuN8kQXVsG1sWCHWy_YciK?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
  - [Agency as experiment to capture value and replace human work with AI](https://fathom.video/share/yJWrVpSJ4ykuN8kQXVsG1sWCHWy_YciK?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
  - [Contracts start at $15k/month, typically closed within a month](https://fathom.video/share/yJWrVpSJ4ykuN8kQXVsG1sWCHWy_YciK?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Current customer base: \~40 clients, aiming for 100+ before rethinking model](https://fathom.video/share/yJWrVpSJ4ykuN8kQXVsG1sWCHWy_YciK?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)

### Current Marketing and Sales Approach

  - [Heavy reliance on inbound leads and relationship building](https://fathom.video/share/yJWrVpSJ4ykuN8kQXVsG1sWCHWy_YciK?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
  - [Extensive content creation and workshops (e.g., recent workshop with 681 signups)](https://fathom.video/share/yJWrVpSJ4ykuN8kQXVsG1sWCHWy_YciK?tab=summary&timestamp=808.0)
  - [High-touch sales process involving founders (Marcel, Jason, Kyle)](https://fathom.video/share/yJWrVpSJ4ykuN8kQXVsG1sWCHWy_YciK?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)
  - [Close rate: 30-40%, often through personalized outreach (e.g., Marcel's texts)](https://fathom.video/share/yJWrVpSJ4ykuN8kQXVsG1sWCHWy_YciK?tab=summary&timestamp=682.0)

### Desired RevOps Improvements

  - [Implement system to capture and act on inbound signals](https://fathom.video/share/yJWrVpSJ4ykuN8kQXVsG1sWCHWy_YciK?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
  - [Develop nurture sequences for warm leads](https://fathom.video/share/yJWrVpSJ4ykuN8kQXVsG1sWCHWy_YciK?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)
  - [Create tasks for personalized follow-ups](https://fathom.video/share/yJWrVpSJ4ykuN8kQXVsG1sWCHWy_YciK?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)
  - [Explore limited cold outreach to test account mapping](https://fathom.video/share/yJWrVpSJ4ykuN8kQXVsG1sWCHWy_YciK?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)

### Kyle's Background and Expertise

  - [Career progression: Digital marketing at Forbes → Full-stack developer → Marketing Ops at Intercom → RevOps freelancing](https://fathom.video/share/yJWrVpSJ4ykuN8kQXVsG1sWCHWy_YciK?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)
  - [Technical skills: Python, React, Django; experience with HubSpot, Clay, and various GTM tools](https://fathom.video/share/yJWrVpSJ4ykuN8kQXVsG1sWCHWy_YciK?tab=summary&timestamp=1303.0)
  - [Current focus: Go-to-market engineering, initial RevOps setup, and advanced GTM plays (e.g., ABM automation for Kit.com)](https://fathom.video/share/yJWrVpSJ4ykuN8kQXVsG1sWCHWy_YciK?tab=summary&timestamp=1543.0)

### Potential Collaboration Areas

  - [HubSpot configuration and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/yJWrVpSJ4ykuN8kQXVsG1sWCHWy_YciK?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Development of scalable, high-touch outreach processes](https://fathom.video/share/yJWrVpSJ4ykuN8kQXVsG1sWCHWy_YciK?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Implementation of multi-channel outreach tools (exploring LogGrowthMachine)](https://fathom.video/share/yJWrVpSJ4ykuN8kQXVsG1sWCHWy_YciK?tab=summary&timestamp=1755.0)
  - [ABM strategy and execution](https://fathom.video/share/yJWrVpSJ4ykuN8kQXVsG1sWCHWy_YciK?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kyle to confirm availability for 30-40 hours/month engagement](https://fathom.video/share/yJWrVpSJ4ykuN8kQXVsG1sWCHWy_YciK?tab=summary&timestamp=1843.0)
  - [Discuss potential starting with a block of hours to test fit](https://fathom.video/share/yJWrVpSJ4ykuN8kQXVsG1sWCHWy_YciK?tab=summary&timestamp=1877.0)
  - [Jason to confer with Bridget about next steps](https://fathom.video/share/yJWrVpSJ4ykuN8kQXVsG1sWCHWy_YciK?tab=summary&timestamp=1978.0)
  - [Consider exploring Beehive vs. Kit for audience building and conversion](https://fathom.video/share/yJWrVpSJ4ykuN8kQXVsG1sWCHWy_YciK?tab=summary&timestamp=1962.0)
